DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-28-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA NA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- Re: c/a 1 - Overruled. Re: c/a 2 - Sustained without leave to amend. Re: c/a 3 - Sustained with leave to amend to plead a claim per UCC 4402. Re: c/a 4 - Sustained with leave to amend to plead a claim under UCC 4406. Re: c/a 5-7 - Sustained without leave to amend. (DAG/301/EH) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-28-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, NA's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT -- Moot per rulings on demurrer. 10 days leave amend to conform complaint to ruling. (DAG/301/EH) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
